title: podochilus warnagalensis
intro: Podochilus warnagalensis, also known as the Indian podochilus or warnagalensis orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and powdered to make a decoction or infusion that can be used to treat various health conditions.
